svc.remoteDeleteDisabled: Deleting from another PC is blocked
svc.lineTooLong: Protocol line exceeds the maximum allowed

del.confirmRemote: Move {0} remote item(s) to safe trash?
tip.help: Open the step-by-step guide for getting started.
tip.findpeer: Run a quick network check and get plain-language tips.
tip.advanced: Show or hide advanced options (ports, manual IP, profiles, security).
wizard.title: Welcome to LanCopy
wizard.s1.title: 1. Same Wi-Fi or cable
wizard.s1.body: Make sure both computers are on the SAME local network: the same Wi-Fi, the same router by cable, or the same Ethernet switch. That's all the setup you need.
wizard.s2.title: 2. Pick the other PC
wizard.s2.body: Open the "Connect to" list at the top. Your other computer should appear there automatically. Select it and press Connect.
wizard.s3.title: 3. Send your files
wizard.s3.body: Drag files into the window or pick them from the list, then send. Tip: scan the QR code with your phone to connect instantly. Stuck? Use the "Can't see the other PC?" button.
diag.title: Network check
diag.thispc: This PC is ready and listening at {0}.
diag.nonet: ⚠ This PC does not seem to be on a network. Connect to your Wi-Fi or plug in the network cable, then try again.
diag.apipa: ⚠ This PC has a self-assigned address (169.254.x.x). It is connected to the adapter but not getting a real address from the router/switch. Check the cable, router, or network settings and try reconnecting.
diag.nopeers: No other computers found yet. Make sure the other PC has LanCopy open and is on the SAME local network: same Wi-Fi, same router by cable, or same Ethernet switch. Some public, guest, or client-isolated networks block PCs from seeing each other. A firewall may also block it the first time; allow LanCopy on private networks.
diag.tips: If it still doesn't work: 1) check both PCs have IPs in the same range, 2) allow LanCopy through the firewall for private networks, 3) if automatic discovery does not appear, type the other PC's IP manually under Advanced. LanCopy uses TCP 8742 and UDP discovery 8743.
app.title: LanCopy — Local network transfer
tip.myip: Your IP on the local network. Give it to the other PC to connect.
tip.copyip: Copy my IP to the clipboard
tip.localport: TCP port this PC listens on. Change it and press Enter (or the button) to restart the server. Both PCs must match.
tip.applyport: Apply the new local port and restart the server.
tip.peers: PCs discovered automatically on the network. Select one to auto-fill IP/port.
tip.remoteip: IP of the other PC (e.g. 192.168.1.25). Press Enter or click Connect.
tip.remoteport: TCP port (1-65535, default 8742). Both PCs must use the same.
tip.connect: Connect to the remote PC (you can also press Enter in the IP field).
tip.connstatus: Connection status with the remote PC (green = connected).
tip.pinlabel: Optional PIN. If set, the other PC must use the same PIN to connect.
tip.pin: Authentication PIN (leave empty for no PIN)
tip.saveprofile: Save IP/port as a named profile
tip.safeMode: On: the other PC only sees what it needs and cannot use delicate actions.
tip.safeModeTemp: Choose how long the other PC can see more folders.
security.safeSummary: Your computer is protected: the other PC only sees what it needs.
security.advancedSummary: The other PC has more access. Protect again when finished.
security.customSummary: Adjusted: you changed some access options manually.
security.keepsTls: Recommended settings let LanCopy connect automatically.
security.keepsSharedFolder: Recommended settings do not allow opening the whole PC.
security.keepsNoDelete: Recommended settings do not allow deleting from another PC.
security.keepsClipboardOff: Recommended settings do not send the clipboard automatically.
security.keepsLinksOff: Recommended settings do not open links automatically.
security.restored: Your computer was protected again automatically.
security.safeOff: The other PC has more access temporarily.
security.blocksPower: Protect my computer blocks shutting down or restarting the other PC.
security.fullDiskEnabled: You can see more folders for {0} minutes.
security.tempDisableConfirm: For 10 minutes you can use delicate options, such as seeing more folders or shutting down/restarting the other PC. Continue?
security.moreAccessFor: The other PC can see more folders for {0} minutes.
security.moreAccessUntilClose: The other PC can see more folders until LanCopy closes.
security.moreAccessRemainingSummary: The other PC can see more folders for {0} more minutes.
security.moreAccessUntilCloseSummary: The other PC can see more folders until you close LanCopy.
dlg.moreAccess.title: Allow more access
dlg.moreAccess.body: How long should the other PC be able to see more folders? LanCopy will protect your computer again automatically.
dlg.rename.confirmRemote: Rename "{0}" to "{1}" on the other PC?
tip.requireApproval: Ask before accepting each incoming file. Auto-rejects after 60s.
tip.requireHighRiskApproval: Ask locally before allowing remote delete/sync-delta/power. If a PIN is configured, it will be requested too.
st.highRiskApprovalOn: Local approval required for high-risk remote commands
st.highRiskApprovalOff: High-risk remote commands no longer require local approval
dlg.consent.title: Incoming file
dlg.highRiskApprove.title: Approve high-risk command
dlg.highRiskPin.title: Confirm local PIN
tip.paircode: Copy a short pairing code (share it instead of IP:port)
tip.readOnly: Reject remote writes (put/delete/rename). Sharing stays safe from modification.
tip.safeModeNoDelete: Blocks only remote delete of your local files. Upload/rename/create folder stay allowed.
tip.tls: Lets LanCopy choose the best way to connect with the other PC.
tip.shareRoot: Limits what the other PC can see to the folder you are sharing.
tip.compress: Compress files in transit (Deflate, max 200 MB)
tip.autoClipboard: Continuously syncs the clipboard with a trusted remote PC when enabled.
tip.autoOpenLinks: Automatically opens received web links in default browser.
tip.thispc: Files on this computer. Select and press Send to transfer them to the remote.
tip.localfilter: Filter the local list by name (updates as you type).
sort.name: Name ⇅
tip.locallist: Local files. Double-click opens folder; right-click = more actions; drag to the remote panel to send.
tip.ctxsend: Send the selected file(s) to the remote PC.
tip.ctxverifyremote: Compare the local file hash with its copy on the remote.
tip.ctxcopypath: Copy the full file path to the clipboard.
tip.send: Send files/folders to the remote. Ctrl+click multiple, Ctrl+A all. You can also drag.
tip.receive: Receive files/folders from the remote. Ctrl+click multiple, Ctrl+A all. You can also drag.
tip.synctoremote: Sync local folder → remote (only different files)
tip.synctolocal: Sync remote folder → local (only different files)
tip.watch: Watch local folder and auto-send changes to the remote
tip.remotepc: Files on the connected remote PC. Select and press Receive to bring them over.
tip.remoteup: Go to the parent folder (remote PC)
tip.remotehome: Back to the remote PC drive list
tip.remoteFavorites: Quick folders on the remote PC
tip.remotePower: Power options for the remote PC
tip.ctxreceivelocal: Bring the selected file(s) from the remote to this PC.
tip.ctxnewfolderremote: Create a new folder in the current remote path.
tip.ctxverifylocal: Compare the remote file hash with its local copy.
status.ready: Ready. Share your IP with the other PC to connect.
tip.status: Status messages and details of the current operation.
dlg.overwrite.title: Confirm overwrite
dlg.overwrite.many: {0} files already exist at the destination.
dlg.rename.title: Rename
st.serverActive: Server active at {0}  —  give this IP to the other PC
st.connectFailedWithHint: Could not connect to {0}  —  {1}. Check that both PCs are on the same local network (Wi-Fi, same router by cable, or same Ethernet switch), that the remote IP is correct, and that the firewall allows LanCopy on private networks: TCP 8742 and UDP 8743.
st.identityChanged: Device identity changed. Connection blocked. Forget and re-pair this device if you trust it.
st.certRejected: Could not verify the other PC. Connection blocked.
st.tlsPeerMismatch: Could not connect automatically. Open LanCopy on both computers and wait for it to appear in nearby PCs.
st.tlsMismatchRemoteOff: The other PC uses an older connection style. LanCopy will ask before continuing.
st.tlsMismatchLocalOff: The other PC uses the normal connection. LanCopy will adjust automatically.
st.tlsAutoUsingSecure: LanCopy is adjusting the connection automatically.
st.tlsAutoUsingCompatible: Trying a connection compatible with this PC.
st.tlsPeerNeedsCompatibility: The other PC needs a compatible connection. Press Connect to choose.
st.tlsCompatibilityCancelled: Connection cancelled. Security was not changed.
dlg.tlsCompatibility.title: Connect this time
dlg.tlsCompatibility.body: The other PC ({0}) uses an older connection style. You can connect this time, but avoid public or unknown networks.
st.queueConnectFailedKept: Could not connect to {0}  —  {1}. The pending queue is kept for retry.
st.queueKeptRetry: Pending queue kept for automatic retry on next startup.
st.connectFirst: Connect to the other PC first
st.selectRemote: Select files/folders in the remote panel
st.localPortInvalid: Invalid local port. Use a value between 1 and 65535.
st.alreadyListening: The server is already listening on port {0}.
st.connectBeforeDrag: Connect to the remote PC before dragging files
tip.remotelist: Remote PC files. Double-click opens folder; right-click = more actions; drag to the local panel to receive.
tip.progress: Progress of the current transfer (send or receive).
st.shareRootOn: The other PC will only see the chosen folder
st.deleteCancelledRemote: Remote delete cancelled by hard confirmation
st.shareRootOff: The other PC can see more folders for a few minutes
st.navRemoteFirst: Navigate to a remote folder first
st.navLocalFirst: Navigate to a local folder first
dlg.hard.title: Hard confirmation
dlg.profile.title: Save profile
tip.sendtext: Send a short message to the other PC. If you just received one, this replies to the sender.
tip.pastelink: Paste a lancopy:// link or ip:port from the clipboard to fill the connection
tip.broadcast: Send the selected files to all discovered peers
tip.sendto: Create a Windows "Send to" shortcut for LanCopy
qr.title: Pairing QR
bw.label: Limit:
st.sendtoDone: Added to the Windows "Send to" menu
svc.pathExistsFile: A file already exists with that name
st.sendtoReady: {0} file(s) ready — connect and press Send
tip.diagexport: Create a ZIP with summary, logs and settings for support (path copied to clipboard).
svc.accessDenied: The other PC has not allowed this action. On the other PC, open Trusted devices and grant permissions to this computer.
svc.tooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect PIN attempts. Please wait.
svc.reparsePath: Path contains a symlink or reparse point
svc.trashFailed: Could not move to recycle bin
tip.receiveDisabledUpload: Receiving is disabled in upload-only mode.
audit.title: Audit
diag.remoteUnreachable: Could not contact {0}. Check that both PCs are on the same local network (same Wi-Fi, same router by cable, or same Ethernet switch), that the IP belongs to the other PC, and that the firewall allows LanCopy on private networks: TCP 8742 and UDP discovery 8743.
st.transferPartial: Transfer completed with errors: {0} OK, {1} failed.
tip.sendDisabledDownload: Sending is disabled in download-only mode.
dlg.devices.title: Trusted devices
dlg.devices.subtitle: Paired = known identity with limited permissions. Trusted does not enable risky features automatically.
dlg.devices.copyFingerprintTip: Copy the full fingerprint to the clipboard
dlg.devices.trustLevelDesc: Paired = identity known. Trusted = advanced features may be enabled manually. OwnerDevice = local device.
dlg.devices.trustedNoAutoRisk: Trusted does not auto-enable delete, sync, clipboard, or power.
dlg.devices.safeDefaults: Safe defaults stay on for browse/download only. Risky permissions stay off until you explicitly turn them on.
dlg.devices.name: Name
dlg.devices.paired: Paired: identity is known, permissions stay limited.
dlg.devices.trusted: Trusted: advanced permissions may be enabled manually.
dlg.devices.ownerDevice: OwnerDevice: local device with full trust.
chat.title: Chat
tip.chat: Open chat with the other PC
chat.subtitle: Messages between these two computers
